message:
Merge PR #2917: chore(deps): update golangci-lint to v2.11.3

Patch version bump for CI linter.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2917
Author: renovate[bot]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -136,7 +136,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: golangci-lint
         uses: golangci/golangci-lint-action@1e7e51e771db61008b38414a730f564565cf7c20 # v9
         with:
-          version: v2.11.2
+          version: v2.11.3
           args: --timeout=5m
 
   integration:
